Completed the Şehzade Mosque in Istanbul: Ya kammala Şehzade Mosque a Istanbul, wanda yake kallo a matsayin aikinsa na farko mai girma.
Completed the Süleymaniye Mosque in Ista: Ya kammala Süleymaniye Mosque a Istanbul, alamar zamanin zinariya na Ottoman.
Completed the Selimiye Mosque in Edirne,: Ya kammala Selimiye Mosque a Edirne, wadda yake kallo a matsayin babban aikin rayuwarsa (masterpiece).
Died in Istanbul at an advanced age and: Ya mutu a Istanbul yana da babban shekaru sannan aka binne shi a wani kabari da ya kera da kansa kusa da Süleymaniye Mosque.
A vast complex and architectural marvel: Wani babban tsari da fasaha ta gine-gine da ta zama alamar iko da girmar mulkin Sultan Suleiman.
Considered by Sinan himself to be his ma: Mimar Sinan da kansa yana kallon ta a matsayin babban aikinsa, inda ya inganta tsarin babban rufi na zagaye (dome structure) sannan ya samar da babban fili na ciki dunkulalle.
A UNESCO World Heritage site, this elega: Wurin Gadon Duniya na UNESCO, wannan gadar mai kyau tana nuna gwanintarsa a fannin civil engineering da kuma daidaituwarta da shimfidar kasa.
Credited with the design and constructio: Ana yaba masa da kera da kuma ginin gine-gine sama da 300, ciki har da masallatai 92, dakunan addu'a 52, makarantu 55, masauki (caravanserais) 20, da kuma fadoji 35.
How many buildings did Mimar Sinan desig: Gine-gine nawa ne Mimar Sinan ya kera?
He is credited with being responsible fo: Ana yaba masa da daukar nauyin gine-gine sama da 300, ciki har da masallatai, fadoji, gadoji, hanyoyin ruwa (aqueducts), da makarantu, kodayake shi da kansa ya kera kuma ya kula da kadan daga cikinsu.
He was born a Christian (likely Cappadoc: An haife shi a matsayin Kirista (kila Cappadocian Greek ko Armenian) sannan ya shiga kasar Ottoman ta hanyar tsarin Devşirme, inda ya shiga addinin Musulunci sannan ya sami horo a matsayin injiniyan soja kafin ya zama mai kera gine-gine (architect).
What is considered Mimar Sinan's masterp: Menene ake kallo a matsayin babban aikin Mimar Sinan?
Sinan himself considered the Selimiye Mo: Sinan da kansa yana kallon Selimiye Mosque a Edirne a matsayin babban aikinsa, wanda ke nuna kololuwar nasarorinsa na gine-gine da kuma cikar aikin rayuwarsa.
How did Sinan's military background infl: Yaya asalin sojansa ya shafi aikinsa?
His experience as a military engineer ga: Kwarewarsa a matsayin injiniyan soja ta ba shi babban ilimi na zahiri kan kayan aiki, kayayyakin gini, da kuma karkon gine-gine. Wannan ginshiki na injiniyanci ya ba shi damar fadada iyakokin zanen gine-gine, inda ya samar da manyan rufi na zagaye (domes) da kuma gine-gine masu karfi a kan babban sikeli.
Born in Hamadan, Persia (modern-day Iran: An haife shi a Hamadan, Persia (Iran ta yanzu).
Leaves Hamadan and travels through the B: Ya bar Hamadan sannan ya yi tafiya a daukacin daular Buyid, yana neman ilimi da goyon baya.
Arrives in Nishapur and famously debates: Ya isa Nishapur sannan ya yi shahararren tattaunawa ta adabi da masana Abu Bakr al-Khwarizmi, inda ya sami lakabinsa 'Badi' al-Zaman'.
Composes his most famous work, the Maqam: Ya rubuta aikinsa mafi shahara, Maqamat, wanda ya samar da sabon kalar adabi.
Dies in Herat (in modern-day Afghanistan: Ya mutu a Herat (Afghanistan ta yanzu) yana da shekaru 38 kacal.
He created the literary genre of the Maq: Ya samar da kalar adabi na Maqama, labarai a cikin rhyming prose (saj') wadanda ke dauke da mutum mai wayo da kuma mai ba da labari.
His works are considered pinnacles of Ar: Ana kallon ayyukansa a matsayin kololuwar salon adabi na Larabci, wanda ke nuna gwaninta ta musamman ta kalmomi, rhetoric, da kuma rhyming prose.
His Maqamat became a model for subsequen: Maqamat dinsa ta zama tsari ga marubuta na baya na tsawon karni da dama, musamman al-Hariri na Basra.
It is an honorific title in Arabic meani: Wani lakabi ne na girmamawa a harshen Larabci wanda ke nufin 'Abin Mamaki na Zamanin' (The Wonder of the Age), wanda aka ba shi bayan ya lashe wani shahararren tattaunawa ta adabi.
Was al-Hamadani Arab or Persian?: Shin al-Hamadani dan Larabawa ne ko kuwa dan Persia?
He was of Persian origin, born in Hamada: Ya kasance dan asalin Persia, an haife shi a Hamadan, amma ya sami ilimi kuma ya zama kwararre a harshen Larabci, wanda ya kasance harshen sadarwa na ilimi da adabi a lokacin.
The Maqamat uses the adventures of a cle: Maqamat tana amfani da labaran kasada na wani mai yawo mai wayo don sukar al'umma, nuna gwanintar harshe, da kuma bincikar jigogi na yaudara, rayuwa, da kuma ikon kalmomi.
Born in Nurs, Bitlis Vilayet, Ottoman Em: An haife shi a Nurs, Bitlis Vilayet, Daular Usmaniyya.
Travels to Istanbul, proposes educationa: Ya tafi Istanbul, inda ya ba da shawarar gyare-gyaren ilimi don hada ilimin addini da na zamani.
Exiled to Burdur, then the remote villag: An tura shi gudun hijira zuwa Burdur, sannan zuwa kauyen Barla mai nisa, wanda ya fara lokacin gudun hijira da tsarewa na tsawon shekaru 25.
Writes the majority of the Risale-i Nur: Ya rubuta mafi yawan tarin Risale-i Nur lokacin da yake gudun hijira a Barla.
Faces his first major trial and imprison: Ya fuskanci shari'arsa ta farko mai girma da tsarewa a Eskisehir, tare da dalibansa da dama.
Dies in Urfa, Turkey. His grave was late: Ya mutu a Urfa, Turkey. Daga baya gwamnatin soja ta mayar da kabarinsa zuwa wani wurin da ba a sani ba.
Authored a 6,000-page Qur'anic commentar: Ya rubuta sharhin Alkur'ani mai shafuka 6,000 wanda ke amsa...'ani mai shafuka 6,000 wanda ke amsa tambayoyi na zamani na bangaskiya, kimiyya, da falsafa.
Inspired a major non-political Islamic f: Ya haifar da wani babban yunkuri na addinin Musulunci wanda ba na siyasa ba a Turkey da kuma daukacin duniya, wanda ke mayar da hankali a ka ilimi da farfadowar ruhaniya.
Developed a methodology to defend religi: Ya samar da wata karna don kare gaskiyar addini ta amfani da hujjojin hankali da dabarun da ke tafiya da kimiyya ta zamani.
It means 'The Wonder of the Age,' a titl: Yana nufin 'Abin Mamaki na Zamanin' (The Wonder of the Age), wani lakabi da aka ba shi lokacin kuruciyarsa saboda hazakarsa ta musamman, rike bayanai a kai, da kuma dabarun tattaunawa.
Was Said Nursi a political figure?: Shin Said Nursi dan siyasa ne?
He was involved in public life in his yo: Ya shiga cikin rayuwar jama'a lokacin kuruciyarsa amma daga baya ya dauki matsayin 'nisantar siyasa,' yana mayar da hankali gaba daya a kan aikin ruhaniya da na bangaskiya ta hanyar rubuce-rubucensa.
Its central purpose is to prove the trut: Babban burinta shi ne tabbatar da gaskiyar Alkur'ani da bangaskiyar Musulunci ta amfani da hujjojin hankali da lura daga duniyar dabi'a, yana yaki da materialism da kafirci (atheism) na zamanin yanzu.
The staunchly secularist Turkish Republi: Jamhuriyar Turkey ta raba addini da gwamnati (secularist) ta kalli koyarwarsa ta addini mai tasiri da kuma al'umma da ke bunkasa a kusa da shi a matsayin barazana ga manufofinta na secular, wanda ya kai ga tura shi gudun hijira, sanya ido, da kuma tsare shi akai-akai.
Born a Kipchak Turk on the Pontic-Caspia: An haife shi a matsayin Kipchak Turk a Pontic-Caspian Steppe.
Sold as a slave in Syria, eventually pur: An sayar da shi a matsayin bawa a Syria, wanda a karshe Sultan na Ayyubid na Egypt ya saya shi.
Plays a key role in defeating the Sevent: Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa wajen kayar da Seventh Crusade a Yakin Al Mansurah.
Leads the vanguard of the Mamluk army to: Ya jagoranci sojojin gaba na Mamluk zuwa nasara a kan Mongols a Yakin Ain Jalut.
Assassinates Sultan Qutuz and ascends to: Ya kashe Sultan Qutuz sannan ya hau karagar mulki a matsayin Sultan na Mamluk.
Captures the Crusader city of Antioch, a: Ya kwace birnin Crusaders na Antioch, wanda ya zama babban kashi ga kasashen Crusaders.
Captures the formidable Crusader castles: Ya kwace sansanonin Crusaders masu karfi na Krak des Chevaliers da Montfort.
Ya mutu a Damascus, wataƙila ta hanyar guba.
Halted the seemingly unstoppable Mongol: Ya dakatar da motsin sojojin Mongol da ake ganin ba za a iya tsayar da su ba zuwa Gabas ta Tsakiya, wani babban lokaci a tarihin duniya.
Systematically conquered key Crusader st: Ya ci manyan sansanonin Crusaders da yaki cikin tsari kamar Antioch da Krak des Chevaliers, wanda ya kawo karshen ikonsu a Levant.
Reformed the army, built infrastructure: Ya gyara sojoji, ya gina ababen more rayuwa kamar magudanan ruwa (canals) da gadoji, sannan ya kafa hanyar aika sakonni (postal network), wanda ya samar da kasa mai karko da karfi.
Why is Baybars called the 'true founder': Me yasa ake kiran Baybars 'wanda ya kafa' Mamluk Sultanate na gaske?
While he was the fourth sultan, his mili: Duk da cewa shi ne sarki na hudu, nasarorinsa na soja, gyaran gudanarwa, da kuma karfafa ikonsa sun sauya kasar Mamluk ta zama daula mai karko da kuma karfi, wanda ya kafa ginshikin mulkinta na shekaru 250.
It means 'the crossbowman,' referring to: Yana nufin 'mai harbin baka' (the crossbowman), yana nuni ga mai gidan da ya fara saya shi a matsayin bawa, amir Aydakin al-Bunduqdar.
Was Baybars a cruel ruler?: Shin Baybars sarki ne maras tausayi?
He was known for his ruthlessness agains: An san shi da rashin tausayi ga abokan gaba da abokan hamayya na siyasa, ciki har da kashe sarkin da ya gabace shi. Sai dai, a matsayin sarki, an kuma san shi da adalci, ibada, da kuma manyan ayyukan jama'a wadanda suka amfani mutanensa.

Completes his epic poem 'Bustan' (The Or: Ya kammala wakarsa ta tarihi 'Bustan' (The Orchard).

Ya mutu a garinsu na Shiraz.
Authored this masterpiece of prose and p: Ya rubuta wannan babban aikin zantuka da waka, wanda ke samar da jagorancin tarbiyya da na al'umma ta hanyar labarai sannan yana daya daqun manyan ayyuka masu tasiri a adabin Farsi.
Composed this long epic poem entirely in: Ya rubuta wannan waka ta tarihi mai tsawo gaba daya cikin verse, yana mayar da hankali a kan kyawawan dabi'u kamar adalci, tawali'u, da gamsuwa, wanda ya karfafa matsayinsa na mai ba da tarbiyya.
Influence on Global Literature: Tasiri a kan Adabi na Duniya
His works were among the first pieces of: Ayyukansa sun kasance cikin sassan farko na adabin Farsi da aka fassara zuwa harsunan Yammacin duniya, wanda ya yi tasiri a kan mutane kamar Voltaire, Goethe, da kuma Ralph Waldo Emerson.
Why is Saadi so famous?: Me yasa Saadi yake da shahara haka?
Saadi is renowned for his two major work: Saadi ya shahara saboda manyan ayyukansa guda biyu, 'Gulistan' da 'Bustan', wadanda ke hada labarai masu ban sha'awa, shawara ta zahiri, da kuma zurfin falsafar tarbiyya a cikin salo mai sauki da kyau wanda ya burge masu karatu na tsawon karni da dama.
He adopted the pen name 'Saadi' in honor: Ya dauki sunan bogi 'Saadi' don girmama Atabeg (sarki) na gida na Fars, Sa'd ibn Zangi, wanda ya kasance mai tallafa masa.
What is his most famous quote?: Menene maganarsa da ta fi shahara?
His most famous verse, part of his 'Guli: Wakarsa da ta fi shahara, wadda take zama bangaren 'Gulistan' dinsa, ita ce 'Ya'yan Adam sassa ne na jiki guda...'. Akwai siffar wannan waka da aka rubuta ta a kofar shiga ginin Majalisar Dinkin Duniya (United Nations) da ke New York.
Rises to power, overthrows Ur-Zababa of: Ya hau karagar mulki, ya hambarar da Ur-Zababa na Kish, sannan ya kafa birnin Akkad.
Conducts a series of military campaigns,: Ya gudanar da yakokin soja da dama, inda ya ci kasashen birni na Sumerian da yaki kamar Uruk, Ur, da Lagash.
Establishes the Akkadian Empire, uniting: Ya kafa Daular Akkadian, wadda ta hada Mesopotamia sannan ta samar da daula ta farko da aka sani a duniya.
Dies after a 56-year reign, passing the: Ya mutu bayan ya yi mulki na shekaru 56, inda ya mika daular ga dansa, Rimush.
He conquered and united the disparate ci: Ya ci kasashen birni daban-daban na Mesopotamia da yaki sannan ya hada su, wanda ya samar da daula ta farko da aka sani a duniya.
He established a standing army of 5,400: Ya kafa rundunar soja ta din-din-din (standing army) ta sojoji 5,400, wani sabon ra'ayi wanda ya ba da damar gudanar da yakokin soja na dogon lokaci.
He standardized weights, measures, and t: Ya daidaita ma'aunai, gwaje-gwaje, da kuma kalandar, sannan ya mayar da harshen Akkadian ya zama harshen gwamnati na hukumance, wanda ya saukaka kasuwanci da gudanarwa.
Was Sargon's birth story true?: Shin labarin haihuwar Sargon na gaske ne?
It is considered a legend, likely create: Ana kallon sa a matsayin tatsuniya, wadda kila an kafa ta don tabbatar da mulkinsa ta hanyar nuna goyon bayan Allah da kuma boye asalin sa da ba na sarauta ba. Labarin yana kama da labarin Littafi Mai Tsarki na Musa na baya.
The name 'Sargon' (Šarru-kīn in Akkadian: Sunan 'Sargon' (Šarru-kīn a harshen Akkadian) yana nufin 'sarki na gaske.' Kila ya dauki wannan sunan lokacin da ya hau karagar mulki don tabbatar da hakkinsa na yin mulki.
After Sargon's death, the empire faced c: Bayan mutuwar Sargon, daular ta fuskanci bore akai-akai. Duk da cewa magadansa sun rike ta na wani lokaci, hadakar rikici na ciki, hare-hare na waje (musamman ta hannun Gutians), da kuma wataƙila yunwa ta sauyin yanayi sun kai ga rushewarta kusan shekarar 2154 BCE.
Born to Ardashir I, the founder of the S: An haife shi ga Ardashir I, wanda ya kafa Daular Sasanian.
Ascends to the throne as the second Sasa: Ya hau karagar mulki a matsayin Sarki na biyu na Sasanian (King of Kings).
Defeats the Roman army under Emperor Gor: Ya kayar da sojojin Roma karkashin Sarki Gordian III a Yakin Misiche.
Conducts his second campaign against Rom: Ya gudanar da yakin soja na biyu yaki da Roma, inda ya lalata babban birnin Antioch.
Achieves his most famous victory at the: Ya samu nasararsa mafi shahara a Yakin Edessa, inda ya kayar sannan ya kama Sarkin Roma Valerian.
Founds the city of Bishapur, using captu: Ya kafa birnin Bishapur, ta amfani da sojoji da injiniyoyi na Roma da aka kama don ginin sa.
Dies, leaving behind a greatly expanded: Ya mutu, inda ya bar daula mai babban fadada da kuma karfafa.
He achieved the unprecedented feat of de: Ya samu nasarar da ba a taba gani ba na kayarwa da kuma kama sarkin Roma, Valerian, wani wulakanci ga Roma wanda aka kiyaye shi a kan bango na Sasanian.
He expanded the Sasanian Empire's territ: Ya fadada yankin Daular Sasanian zuwa Roman Syria da Armenia sannan ya karfafa mamayar mahaifinsa.
He founded several major cities, includi: Ya kafa manyan birane da dama, ciki har da Bishapur da Gundeshapur, wadanda suka zama cibiyoyin al'adu, gudanarwa, da kuma ilimi masu mahimmanci.
What happened to the captured Emperor Va: Menene ya faru da Sarki Valerian da aka kama?
Historical accounts vary. Sasanian sourc: Bayanan tarihi sun bambanta. Hanyoyin Sasanian sun ce an mutunta shi, yayin da hanyoyin Roma suka nuna cewa an wulakanta shi, wataƙila Shapur ya yi amfani da shi a matsayin matakin kafa na mutum. Ya mutu a tsare, kuma an yi amfani da gwanintarsa, tare da na sojojinsa, don ayyukan gine-gine a Persia.
What was Shapur I's religious policy?: Menene manufar addini ta Shapur I?
Shapur I was a Zoroastrian but practiced: Shapur I ya kasance mabiya Zoroastrian amma ya bi tsarin hakuri da addini. Ya kare annabi Mani, wanda ya kafa Manichaeism, sannan ya ba wa al'ummar Kirista da na Yahudawa damar bunkasa a cikin daularsa.
They are a series of large rock reliefs: Suna daya daqun zane-zane a kan bango na duwatsu a Iran. Shapur I ya ba da umarnin zana hoton da ke nuna nasararsa a kan sarakunan Roma guda uku: Gordian III, Philip the Arab, da kuma Valerian da aka kama.
Born in Constantinople, son of Sultan Mu: An haife shi a Constantinople, dan Sultan Mustafa III.
Ascends to the Ottoman throne during the: Ya hau karagar mulki ta Ottoman lokacin yakokin Austro-Turkish da Russo-Turkish.
Signs the Treaty of Jassy, ending the wa: Ya sanya hannu a kan Yarjejeniyar Jassy, wadda ta kawo karshen yakin da Russia sannan ta ba shi damar mayar da hankali a kan gyare-gyaren gida.
Formally establishes the 'Nizam-ı Cedid': Ya kafa 'Nizam-ı Cedid' (New Order) a hukumance don zamanantar da kasar, yana farawa da sabuwar rundunar soja.
Faces the French invasion of Ottoman Egy: Ya fuskanci mamayar Faransa a Ottoman Egypt da Syria, karkashin jagorancin Napoleon Bonaparte.
Deposed by a Janissary revolt led by Kab: Boren Janissary karkashin jagorancin Kabakçı Mustafa ya hambarar da shi, sannan aka soke gyare-gyarensa.
Assassinated in the Topkapı Palace on th: An kashe shi a Topkapı Palace da umarnin magajinsa, Mustafa IV, lokacin wani yunkuri na maido da shi a kan karagar mulki.
Established a modern, European-trained i: Ya kafa rundunar soja ta zamani, wadda ta sami horo a Turai don kalubalantar ikon Janissaries na gargajiya.
Opened the first permanent Ottoman embas: Ya bude ofisoshin jakadanci na din-din-din na farko na Ottoman a manyan biranen Turai kamar London, Paris, da Vienna.
Was an accomplished poet, calligrapher,: Ya kasance kwararren mawaƙi, mai rubutun zamani (calligrapher), da mawaƙi wanda ya kera ayyuka da dama, wanda ya inganta bunkasar al'adu lokacin mulkinsa.
It was a series of reforms in the late 1: Ya kasance jerin gyare-gyare a karshen karni na 18 da ke da burin zamanantar da Daular Usmaniyya. Babban al'amarinsa shi ne samar da sabuwar rundunar soja irin ta Yamma, amma kuma ya hada da canje-canje na kudi, gudanarwa, da kuma diflomasiyya.
Why did the Janissaries oppose Selim III: Me yasa Janissaries suka nuna adawa da Selim III?
They saw his new army, the Nizam-ı Cedid: Sun kalli sabuwar rundunar sojarsa, Nizam-ı Cedid, a matsayin barazana kai-tsaye ga ikon sojojinsu na karni da dama, tasirin siyasa, da kuma matsayinsu na gata a cikin daular.
Was Selim III's reign a complete failure: Shin mulkin Selim III ya kasance rashin nasara gaba daya?
While his reforms were overturned and he: Duk da cewa an soke gyare-gyarensa sannan aka kashe shi, kokarinsa ya kasance yunkuri na farko mai girma na zamanantarwa irin ta Yamma. Ana kallon mulkinsa a matsayin babban sauyi na tarihi, kodayake na bakin ciki, wanda ya kafa ginshikin gyare-gyaren Tanzimat na baya.
An haife shi a Herat, kasar Afghanistan ta yanzu.
Ascends the Safavid throne at the age of: Ya hau karagar mulki ta Safavid yana da shekaru 16 lokacin juyin mulki na soja yaki da mahaifinsa.
Signs a harsh peace treaty with the Otto: Ya sanya hannu a kan yarjejeniyar zaman lafiya mai tsanani da Daular Usmaniyya, inda ya bayyar da manyan yankuna don siyan lokaci na gyare-gyare na ciki.
Moves the capital from Qazvin to Isfahan: Ya mayar da babban birnin Qazvin zuwa Isfahan sannan ya kayar da Uzbeks kusa da Herat, wanda ya kare iyakar gabas.
Wages a successful war against the Ottom: Ya yi yaki mai nasara yaki da Daular Usmaniyya, inda ya dawo da yankunan da suka hada da Baghdad, Azerbaijan, da kuma Georgia.
With the help of the English navy, captu: Tare da taimakon rundunar sojan ruwa ta Ingila, ya kwace tsibirin Hormuz mai dabarar yaki daga hannun Portuguese.
Ya sake kwace Baghdad daga hannun Ottomans.
Dies in Mazandaran, leaving a powerful b: Ya mutu a Mazandaran, inda ya bar gado mai karfi amma mara karko sakamakon rashin magaji mai cancanta.
He created the 'ghulam' corps, a standin: Ya samar da dakarun 'ghulam', sojojin bawa na musamman wadanda ke da aminci ga Shah kadai, wanda ya lalata ikon kabilar Qizilbash.
He successfully waged wars against the O: Ya yi nasarar yakokin soja yaki da Daular Usmaniyya da Uzbeks, wanda ya maido da iyakokin gargajiya na Persia.
He transformed Isfahan into a magnificen: Ya sauya Isfahan ta zama babban birni mai ban sha'awa, cibiyar fasaha, gine-gine, da kasuwanci ta duniya, wadda Naqsh-e Jahan Square ke nuna girmanta.
He revitalized the Persian economy by mo: Ya farfado da tattalin arzikin Persia ta hanyar mallakar da inganta kasuwancin siliki, gina ababen more rayuwa, da kuma tabbatar da tsaron jama'a a kan hanyoyin kasuwanci.
Why is Abbas I known as 'the Great'?: Me yasa ake kiran Abbas I 'Mai Girma'?
He is called 'the Great' for restoring P: Ana kiran sa 'Mai Girma' saboda maido da karfin soja da na siyasa na Persia, fadada iyakokinta, da kuma jagorancin zamanin zinariya na al'adu da tattalin arziki.
What was his relationship with his sons?: Yaya alakar sa take da 'ya'yansa maza?
Tragically, he grew paranoid of conspira: Abin bakin ciki shi ne, ya zama mai tsoron makirci. Ya ba da umarnin kashe dansa na farko kuma magaji Mohammad Baqer Mirza sannan ya makantar da wasu 'ya'yansa maza guda biyu, wanda hakan ya bar daula ba tare da magaji mai cancanta ba.
The ghulams were an elite military corps: Ghulams sun kasance dakarun soja na musamman wadanda ke dauke da mutanen Circassia, Georgia, da kuma Armenia da suka shiga Musulunci sannan suka sami horo. Suna da aminci mai tsanani ga Shah da kansa, ba wai ga kabilu ba.
He actively sought alliances with Europe: Ya nemi kawance da kasashen Turai, kamar Spain da Ingila, don samar da wani fage na biyu yaki da abokin gaba na gama gari, Daular Usmaniyya. Wannan ya kai ga karuwar alakar diflomasiyya da ta kasuwanci tsakanin Persia da Turai.
Born in Nineveh, a younger son of King E: An haife shi a Nineveh, dan karanci shekaru na Sarki Esarhaddon.
Ascends to the throne of Assyria after t: Ya hau karagar mulki ta Assyria bayan mutuwar mahaifinsa.
Conducts major campaigns in Egypt, culmi: Ya gudanar da manyan yakoki a Egypt, wanda ya kare da lalata Thebes.
A devastating civil war begins with his: Yakin basasa na lalacewa ya fara da yayansa Shamash-shum-ukin, sarkin Babylon.
Defeats his brother and sacks the city o: Ya kayar da yayansa sannan ya lalata birnin Babylon, wanda ya kawo karshen yakin basasa.
Sacks the Elamite capital of Susa, effec: Ya lalata babban birnin Elamite na Susa, wanda ya lalata masarautar hamayya ta Elam gaba daya.
Dies, leaving the Assyrian Empire at its: Ya mutu, inda ya bar Daular Assyria a kololuwar girmanta amma tana da matukar rauni a ciki.
Assembled the first systematically colle: Ya tattara daki-daki sannan ya tsara dakin karatu na farko a cikin duniyar da, inda ya kiyaye rubuce-rubucen cuneiform sama da 30,000.
Maintained the Neo-Assyrian Empire at it: Ya rike Daular Neo-Assyrian a kololuwar girmanta na yankin kasa, wadda ta tashi daga Tsaunukan Caucasus zuwa Egypt da kuma daga Cyprus zuwa yammacin Iran.
Decisively defeated the long-time rival: Ya kayar da masarautar hamayya ta Elam gaba daya, inda ya lalata babban birninta Susa sannan ya kawo karshen barazanarta ga Mesopotamia.
Was Ashurbanipal really literate?: Shin da gaske ne Ashurbanipal yana da ilimi (literate)?
Yes. Uniquely for an Assyrian king of hi: E. A siffarsa ta musamman ga sarkin Assyria na zamaninsa, ya yi alfahari a cikin rubuce-rubucensa kan ikonsa na karantawa da rubuta rubutun cuneiform mai sarkakiya, ciki har da na da na Sumerian.
What happened to the Assyrian Empire aft: Menene ya faru da Daular Assyria bayan mutuwarsa?
The empire, weakened by decades of civil: Daular, wadda ta raunana sakamakon yakin basasa na shekaru da dama da kuma yakoki akai-akai, ta rushe cikin sauri. A cikin shekaru ashirin da mutuwarsa, an lalata Nineveh sannan daular ta bace gaba daya.
How was his library rediscovered?: Yaya aka sake gano dakin karatunsa?
The ruins of his library were discovered: An gano kufai na dakin karatunsa a tsakiyar karni na 19 ta hannun masanin hakar kayan tarihi na Birtaniya Austen Henry Layard a shafin ancient Nineveh, a kasar Iraq ta yanzu. Rubuce-rubucen da aka gano a can su ne ginshikin ilimin Assyriology na zamani.
What is his most famous depiction in art: Menene hotonsa da ya fi shahara a fannin fasaha?
He is famously depicted in palace relief: An zana shi sosai a cikin fadoji a cikin wani shiri da aka sani da 'Garden Party', inda yake kwance a kan gado yayin da kan sarkin Elamite Teumman da aka yanke ke rataye a jikin wata bishiya kusa da shi.
Born in Cairo, Egypt, to a wealthy famil: An haife shi a Alkahira, Egypt, a cikin dangi mai dukiya mai asalin hadaka na Turkish, Arab, Circassian, Kurdish, da kuma Greek.
Graduated from the School of Law and was: Ya kammala karatu a Makarantar Shari'a sannan Khedive Tewfik ya tura shi yin karatu a Faransa na tsawon shekaru uku.
Returned to Egypt and was appointed to a: Ya koma Egypt sannan aka nada shi a babban matsayi a fadar Khedive Abbas II.
Forced into exile by the British authori: Hukumomin Birtaniya sun tilasta masa tafiya gudun hijira saboda wakokinsa na kishin kasa da kuma goyon bayan 'yancin kai na Egypt. Ya zabi zama a Andalusia, Spain.
Returned to Egypt from exile and was hai: Ya koma Egypt daga gudun hijira sannan aka girmama shi a matsayin gwarzon kasa.
Crowned 'Amir al-Shu'ara' (The Prince of: Abokan aikinsa sun nada shi a matsayin 'Amir al-Shu'ara' (The Prince of Poets) a wani taro mai girma, wanda ke nuna matsayinsa na mawaƙi na gaba a duniyar Larabawa.
Ya mutu a Alkahira yana da shekaru 64.
Officially crowned by his peers in 1927,: Abokan aikinsa sun nada shi sarki a hukumance a shekarar 1927, wanda ya amince da shi a matsayin mawaƙi mafi girma na harshen Larabci na zamaninsa.
Pioneer of Arabic Poetic Drama: Majagaba na Wasan Kwaikwayo na Wakar Larabci
He introduced and established the genre: Ya shigo da kuma kafa kalar wasan kwaikwayo na waka a cikin adabin Larabci na zamani da wasanni kamar 'The Death of Cleopatra' da 'Majnun Laila'.
He blended classical Arabic poetic forms: Ya hada tsarin wakokin Larabci na da da tasirin Turai, wanda ya farfado da harshe da jigogin wakokin Larabci na zamanin yanzu.
His patriotic poems inspired the Egyptia: Wakokinsa na kishin kasa sun zaburar da yunkurin kishin kasa na Egypt sannan suka karfafa rawarsa a matsayin alamar al'adu da siyasa.
Why was he called the 'Prince of Poets'?: Me yasa ake kiran sa 'Prince of Poets'?
The title 'Amir al-Shu'ara' was bestowed: Kwamitin mawaƙa da marubuta na Larabawa ya ba shi lakabin 'Amir al-Shu'ara' a shekarar 1927 don girmama gudunmawarsa ta musamman, gwanintarsa a harshen Larabci, da kuma rawarsa wajen farfado da zamanantar da wakokin Larabci.
What was the impact of his exile in Spai: Menene tasirin gudun hijirarsa a Spain?
His exile in Andalusia (Spain) was a per: Gudun hijirarsa a Andalusia (Spain) ya kasance lokaci na babban aiki na fasaha. Ya samar da wahayi ga wasu ayyukansa mafi karfi, inda ya bayyana bakin cikin rabuwa da Egypt sannan ya kwatanta da daukakar daular Larabawa da ta bace a Spain.
What are his most famous works?: Menene ayyukansa da suka fi shahara?
His most famous works include his collec: Ayyukansa da suka fi shahara sun hada da tarin wakokinsa 'Al-Shawqiyyat', da kuma wasannin kwaikwayo na waka kamar 'The Death of Cleopatra', 'Majnun Laila', da kuma 'Cambyses'.
Is he still relevant today?: Shin har yanzu yana da amfani yau?
Yes, Shawqi is considered a foundational: E, ana kallon Shawqi a matsayin ginshikin adabin Larabci na zamani. Ana nazarin wakokinsa a makarantu a daukacin duniyar Larabawa, kuma sababbin abubuwan da ya shigo da su a cikin wasan kwaikwayo na waka da wakoki masu dadi suna ci gaba da yin tasiri a kan marubuta yau.
An haife shi a Lofça (yanzu Lovech, Bulgaria).
Arrived in Constantinople to pursue high: Ya isa Constantinople don neman ilimi mai zurfi.
Appointed official historian of the Otto: An nada shi a matsayin masanin tarihi na hukumance na Daular Usmaniyya.
Appointed head of the Mecelle Commission: An nada shi shugaban Mecelle Commission don tsara dokar gida (civil law) ta Ottoman.
Served his first of several terms as Min: Ya yi aiki a matsayin Ministan Shari'a a karon farko na lokuta da dama.
Led the commission that codified Hanafi: Ya jagoranci kwamitin da ya tsara dokar Hanafi ta zama dokar gida (civil code) ta farko ta Daular Usmaniyya, wadda ta shafi doka a daukacin duniyar Musulunci.
Authored a monumental 12-volume history: Ya rubuta tarihin Daular Usmaniyya mai kashi 12 daga shekarar 1774 zuwa 1826, wanda yake zama babban rubutu na tarihin Turkish na zamani.
Played a pivotal role as a statesman and: Ya taka muhimmiyar rawa a matsayin dan siyasa da masani a cikin gyare-gyaren zamanantarwa na karni na 19 na kasar Ottoman da al'umma.
The Mecelle (Mecelle-i Ahkâm-ı Adliyye): Mecelle (Mecelle-i Ahkâm-ı Adliyye) ta kasance dokar gida ta Daular Usmaniyya a karshen karni na 19 da farkon karni na 20. Ta kasance yunkuri na farko na tsara sashi na dokar Shari'a ga kasa ta zamani.
Was Ahmed Cevdet Pasha a conservative or: Shin Ahmed Cevdet Pasha mai ra'ayin mazan jiya ne ko kuwa mai gyara?
He was a unique figure who sought a synt: Ya kasance mutum na musamman wanda ya nemi hadin kai. Ya yi imanin shigo da cibiyoyin irin na Yamma amma ya nace cewa dole ne su ginu a kan kuma su dace da al'adar Musulunci, wanda hakan ya mayar da shi 'mai gyara mai rike da al'ada'.
What was his most important contribution: Menene gudunmawarsa mafi mahimmanci bayan Mecelle?
His 12-volume historical work, 'Tarih-i: Babban aikinsa na tarihi mai kashi 12, 'Tarih-i Cevdet', ana kallon sa a matsayin babban aikin tarihin Ottoman da kuma muhimmin tushe don fahimtar sauyin daular zuwa zamanin zamani.
An haife shi a Ray, Persia (Iran ta yanzu).
Appointed chief physician of the hospita: An nada shi babban likita na asibiti a Ray.
Moved to Baghdad and was appointed direc: Ya koma Baghdad sannan aka nada shi daraktan babban asibiti, wanda ya gano wurinsa ta amfani da wani gwaje-gwaje da ya hada da rube-ruben nama.
Wrote 'A Treatise on Smallpox and Measle: Ya rubuta 'A Treatise on Smallpox and Measles' (Kitab al-Judari wa al-Hasbah), littafi na farko da ya bambanta cututtukan biyu ta hanyar lafiya.
Died in his hometown of Ray. His student: Ya mutu a garinsu na Ray. Daga baya dalibansa sun tattara bayanansa a cikin 'Kitab al-Hawi' (The Comprehensive Book).
He was the first to provide a clear clin: Ya kasance na farko da ya samar da bayyani da kuma bambanci na fili tsakanin wadannan cututtuka guda biyu masu yaduwa.
Authored a monumental medical encycloped: Ya rubuta encyclopedia na likitanci mai girma wanda ya hada ilimin likitanci na Girka, Siriya, da na Larabci na farko, wanda ya yi tasiri a kan likitanci na tsawon karni.
He used controlled experiments, such as: Ya yi amfani da gwaje-gwaje, kamar rataye nama don tantance wuri mafi tsabta ga asibiti a Baghdad.
He systematically classified chemical su: Ya tsara rarrabuwar abubuwa na sinadarai (chemical substances), ya bayyana hanyoyin sinadarai da dama, sannan ya kera kuma ya bayyana kayayyakin dakin gwaje-gwaje sama da ashirin.
No, he was a polymath who wrote over 200: A'a, ya kasance masani (polymath) wanda ya rubuta ayyuka sama da 200 a kan batutuwa daban-daban, ciki har da falsafa, alchemy, kade-kade, tarbiyya, da kuma addini, baya ga rubuce-rubucensa na likitanci.
How did he choose the location for the B: Yaya ya zabi wurin asibitin Baghdad?
He famously hung pieces of fresh meat in: Ya rataye sassan danye nama a wurare daban-daban a fadin birnin sannan ya zabi wurin da naman ya rube a hankali, inda ya fahimci cewa shi ne wuri mafi tsabta kuma mafi karancin datti.
What was his most important medical book: Menene littafinsa na likitanci mafi mahimmanci?
While his treatise on smallpox and measl: Duk da cewa littafinsa a kan smallpox da measles ya kasance mai ban mamaki, aikinsa mafi girma da tasiri shi ne 'Kitab al-Hawi' (The Comprehensive Book), wani babban encyclopedia na ilimin likitanci da aka tattara daga bayanansa bayan mutuwarsa.
Born in Baghdad, son of the fifth Abbasi: An haife shi a Baghdad, dan Caliph na biyar na Abbasid, Harun al-Rashid.
